permutation.interpretation: p=0.000. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 1.234, 95% CI [0.356, 2.240]. CI excludes zero — Sharpe is statistically meaningful.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 25.5% of total P&L (614 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
